title: Intellia Therapeutics Announces FDA Lift of Clinical Hold on MAGNITUDE Phase 3 Clinical Trial in ATTR-CM
text: Intellia Therapeutics announced that the FDA has removed the clinical hold on the IND for MAGNITUDE Phase 3 clinical trial in ATTR amyloidosis with cardiomyopathy (ATTR-CM). The company also announced the FDA lifted the clinical hold on the MAGNITUDE-2 Phase 3 clinical trial for patients with hereditary transthyretin amyloidosis with polyneuropathy (ATTRv-PN). Both MAGNITUDE and MAGNITUDE-2 Phase 3 clinical trials were temporarily paused following a patient who experienced a grade 4 liver adverse event in MAGNITUDE. The company has aligned with the FDA on certain study modifications and mitigation measures that include enhanced safety monitoring of liver laboratory tests. Nex-z (nexiguran ziclumeran) is being investigated in MAGNITUDE and MAGNITUDE-2 Phase 3 clinical trials for patients with ATTR amyloidosis. Enrollment to resume with completion expected in H2 2026.
